title: Time to up Our Average
overview: Fearful of what their recent test results could mean for them at the Royal Academy of Diavolo, the eldest of the seven brothers, Lucifer, sits his brothers down for a much-needed family study group to up their average. However, when his brothers struggle to focus and get any study done, Lucifer must take drastic measures to stop them from slacking off.

title: Don't Look!
overview: Alone in his room, third-born Leviathan lets his inner cosplayer loose as he puts on a one-man show dressed as his favorite character Ruri Hana from "The Magical Ruri Hana: Demon Girl." However, when his younger brothers have little care for boundaries, Leviathan must hide his cosplay as sixth-born Beelzebub and seven-born Belphegor come unexpectedly barging in.

title: Carrots, Please!
overview: Welcome to the bunny boy café in which the brothers dress up as bunnies! If you find a bunny you like, please give him a carrot. The brothers will do their best serving you to earn a carrot. Please enjoy your time and relax. Oh? Your time is up with the bunny boys! You have one carrot left... Which bunny will get your very last carrot?

title: Lucifer the Beach Babe
overview: The brothers are at the private beach of Lord Diavolo, the only son of the Demon King (Levi isn't much of an outdoor type so he is absent). The ever-so-poor Mammon secretly tries to carry out his plan, which is to take a shirtless photo of Lucifer and sell it to Lucifer's fans at RAD. However, his opponent is a tough one! With no openings, there are no photo opportunities. Mammon has had it and comes up with a final plan. Will he succeed...?

title: Princess Asmodeus Is in Another Castle
overview: In a desolate land oddly reminiscent of a JRPG, the final boss Beelzebub sits upon a throne with his captive, Princess Asmo, by his side. To save the princess, three adventurers, Leviathan the Hero, Satan the Warrior, and Belphegor the Mage, confront Beelzebub. But when the mighty Leviathan slays Beelzebub with one swing, the adventurers don't receive the reaction they were expecting.

title: Detective Satan
overview: It seems as if Satan has been reading too many detective novels. Springing into action, Detective Satan begins solving mysteries left, right and center — that is until catching the perpetrator of one crime proves nearly unthinkable.

title: Obey Me! The Anime Audio Commentary
overview: In this episode, the Obey Me! voice cast takes a look back at the first six anime episodes. Hear behind-the-scenes stories about recording the anime, and in classic Obey Me! VA fashion, wholly unrelated stories that go completely off the rails.

title: A Dog by Any Other Name
overview: Mammon finds the "Forbidden Book of Body Switching" and plans to use it for some mischief, but when a dog interferes Mammon is certain everyone in the house will make fun of the results. However, the opposite happens?

title: The First Great Sibling Psychological War
overview: Beelzebub, Belphegor, and Asmodeus are exercising in the library of the house when disaster strikes. Fearing Lucifer's anger, each of the three try using any excuse they can think of to avoid being the one to tell Lucifer what happened.

title: A Trip for Seven — Part 1
overview: Belphegor wakes up uncharacteristically early one morning only to find his brothers still in bed. Learning that they were up all night playing cards without him, Belphegor fears that they are avoiding him. To mend his twin's broken heart and bring his brothers together, Beelzebub sets out on a quest to chow down on ice cream.

title: A Trip for Seven — Part 2
overview:
It's finally time! The brothers are enjoying their much-awaited trip together. But when they ask their trip leader, Beelzebub, the plans for the next day, they learn it's nothing but sushi, sushi, and more sushi.

Later, a playful pillow fight spurs Belphegor to confront his brothers about what's been weighing on his mind.

title: A Brotherless New Year's Eve Party
overview: A few certain someones have been watching the brothers' antics and appear to have some insights into what happened after the curtains closed. In this final episode, take a look back at the first season of Obey Me! The Anime.

title: The Long Awaited Ruri-chan Viewing Party
Obey Me! The Anime Season 2 Audio Commentary
